channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: The Division Resurgence Will Launch This Month
item.content:encoded:
The wait is almost over. The Division Resurgence is launching on March 31, 2026, on iOS and Android.

It’s been 10 years since Tom Clancy’s The Division was first released. In celebration of that anniversary, Ubisoft has announced that The Division Resurgence, a mobile game in the series, will launch later this month on March 31. The game is powered by Unreal Engine.

Preregistrations are now available, and those who pre-register will receive rewards at launch. Those rewards will be the exclusive New York City firefighter cosmetic set and Pure Gold weapon skins. There will also be exclusive rewards for players of The Division 2.

More Details on The Division Resurgence

The upcoming release is a PvPvE open-world experience. The campaign offers a new perspective on the events of the first Division games.

The gameplay walkthrough video suggested that the campaign starts after the events of the first Division game. As with most games of this genre, there will be plenty of opportunities to loot, craft, and upgrade gear along the way while customizing your avatar to your favorite playstyle and experience.

The team promised more announcements and news in the forthcoming weeks. Insider Gaming will provide any further updates as they are made available.

In other mobile game news, Call of Duty is sunsetting Warzone mobile. Learn more here.

Are you looking forward to playing The Division Resurgence? What are your thoughts on mobile gaming overall? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

item.title: Life Is Strange TV Series Finds Its Max and Chloe
item.content:encoded:
The Life Is Strange television series has found its Chloe and Max. The series, yet another video game adaptation coming to Amazon Prime Video, has reportedly cast its main protagonists. Variety first reported that Tatum Grace Hopkins had been cast as Max, while Maisy Stella will be playing Chloe.

This will be the television debut for Hopkins, a veteran of the stage. Stella, on the other hand, was featured on the hit ABC television show “Nashville” in her younger years. She also recently starred in the film “My Old Ass.”

The official description of the show appears to stay true to the first Life Is Strange video game. Max will discover her ability to rewind time and go on a life-changing journey with Chloe. The series will be written, run, and executive-produced by Charlie Covell.

Life Is Strange Games Will Soon Finish Max and Chloe’s Story

The upcoming Life Is Strange: Reunion game will involve merging timelines, the return of Chloe, and allow players the chance to close Max and Chloe’s story their way. Learn more about the game, which will be released later this month, at this link.

Amazon Prime Video is also hard at work on the forthcoming God of War series. A number of recent casting choices have just been made public for that series as well. Learn more here.

Are you optimistic about this upcoming series? Do you think that certain video games should be left to stand on their own rather than being adapted into other forms of media? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1719: Hints and Answer for March 4, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Wordle challenges players to guess a fresh five-letter word each day in six tries or fewer. Whether you’re a beginner or a daily player, today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1719 for March 4, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, March 4, 2026

The Wordle answer for game #1719 will give many players a fit. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 5.3 out of 6 guesses. That makes it a bit harder than the 4.8-guess average from March 3.

General Wordle Hints For March 4

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: This word refers to an event, not a person.
  • Hint 2: It’s most often discussed in legal or news-related contexts.
  • Hint 3: The situation it describes usually involves loss for one side.
  • Hint 4: You’re more likely to see this word in reports or headlines than casual conversation.

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1719 for March 4, 2026.

Starter Words For March 4, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • HEIST
  • FLESH
  • DEALT
  • THEFT

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1719 On March 4, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: THEFT

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

THEFT is a noun that means “the act of stealing; the wrongful taking and carrying away of the personal goods or property of another; larceny.”

Yesterday’s Wordle Answer

If you missed the previous game, here’s yesterday’s Wordle answer for Game #1718 on March 3, 2026

Answer: LINEN

While not always the case, looking at previous words can sometimes give you insight into common patterns or letter usage in Wordle puzzles.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1719?

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads up. The game on March 4 will be Wordle Game #1720.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw
